CustomField.formula: and( Appointment__r.Help_Parent_Code_in__c <> '3', Appointment__r.Help_Parent_Code_in__c <> '4', Appointment__r.Help_Parent_Code_in__c <> '5', Appointment__r.Help_Parent_Code_in__c <> '6', Appointment__r.Help_Parent_Code_in__c <> '7') || contains(Appointment__r.Medical_Procedure__r.Name,'קטרקט') || contains(Appointment__r.Medical_Procedure2__r.Name,'קטרקט') || contains(Appointment__r.Medical_Procedure3__r.Name,'קטרקט') || contains(Appointment__r.Medical_Procedure4__r.Name,'קטרקט')
CustomField.label: Relevant for patient lobby
